meaning: n.(东非国家)索马里族(人) 索马里语
examples: He is currently writing a dissertation on the Somali civil war.
He called on the leaders of Somali society to persuade pirates operating off the coast of the Horn of Africa to stop hijacking ships for ransom.
The Somali elders said so too.
Mr Cameron said UK security was threatened by radicalism that was "poisoning young Somali minds".
She pushed to capture Somali warlord Mohammed Farrah Aidid, but has been sobered by that debacle.
